workflow.name: Monitor Reddit for sales opportunities with GPT-4o and create Asana tasks
workflow.description:
![image.png](fileId:3851)
## 📊 Description
Automate sales opportunity discovery by continuously analyzing Reddit discussions for real buying intent using AI. 🔍🤖 This workflow runs every two hours, searches Reddit posts via Google, evaluates each discussion with a conservative AI model, and determines whether it represents a genuine sales opportunity. High-quality opportunities are enriched with intent level, problem summary, confidence score, and recommended next action—then automatically converted into Asana tasks with real-time Google Chat alerts. Ideal for sales and growth teams looking to capture demand signals without manual monitoring. 🚀📊

## 🔁 What This Template Does
1️⃣ Runs automatically every 2 hours using a scheduled trigger. ⏰
 2️⃣ Searches Google for Reddit posts containing buying-intent keywords. 🔍
 3️⃣ Extracts Reddit titles, snippets, and post URLs from search results. 🌐
 4️⃣ Processes each Reddit post individually to avoid batching issues. 🔄
 5️⃣ Uses an AI agent to analyze intent based strictly on post text. 🤖
 6️⃣ Determines whether the post is a real sales opportunity. 🚦
 7️⃣ Classifies intent level as High, Medium, or Low. 📊
 8️⃣ Summarizes the core problem and suggests a reasonable next action. 📝
 9️⃣ Assigns a confidence score (0–100) for opportunity strength. 🎯
 🔟 Routes opportunities based on intent level.🔀
 1️⃣1️⃣ Creates Asana tasks for qualified leads with full AI context attached. 📋
 1️⃣2️⃣ Sends real-time Google Chat alerts for sales visibility. 💬
 1️⃣3️⃣ Triggers Gmail alerts automatically if any workflow error occurs. 🚨

## ⭐ Key Benefits
✅ Discovers real buyer intent from organic Reddit conversations
 ✅ Eliminates manual Reddit scanning and lead qualification
 ✅ Uses conservative AI logic to avoid false positives
 ✅ Automatically turns insights into actionable sales tasks
 ✅ Provides confidence scores and problem summaries for context
 ✅ Keeps sales teams informed with instant Google Chat alerts

## 🧩 Features
- Scheduled Reddit discovery via Google Search (SerpApi)
- AI-based opportunity detection using GPT-4o-mini
- Strict structured JSON output for reliable automation
- Intent-based routing (Low / Medium / High)
- Automated Asana task creation with detailed notes
- Google Chat alerts for real-time notifications
- Gmail-based error handling
Scalable batch-safe processing

## 🔐 Requirements
- SerpApi API key
- OpenAI API key (GPT-4o-mini recommended)
- Asana OAuth2 credentials
- Google Chat OAuth2 credentials
- Gmail OAuth2 credentials (for error alerts)

## 🎯 Target Audience
- B2B sales and outbound teams
- Growth and demand-generation teams
- SDR and lead qualification teams
- SaaS founders monitoring market demand
- RevOps and automation teams

workflow.name: Monitor Reddit for sales opportunities and create Asana tasks

parameters.content:
## 🎯 Reddit Sales Opportunity Monitor

**What it does:**  
Automatically scans Reddit every 2 hours to identify potential sales opportunities using AI analysis

**How it works:**  
1. Searches Google for Reddit posts matching target keywords  
2. AI analyzes each post for buying intent and problem-solving needs  
3. Filters and routes by intent level (high/medium/low)  
4. Creates Asana tasks for qualified leads  
5. Sends real-time Google Chat alerts to your team

**Requirements:**  
• SerpApi (Google search)  
• OpenAI API (GPT-4o)  
• Asana workspace  
• Google Chat space

**Setup:**  
Update search query, Asana workspace ID, and Google Chat space IDs before running

## 📡 Data Collection
Scheduled search every 2 hours → Fetches Reddit posts via Google → Splits results for individual processing

## 🧠 AI Analysis & Filtering
AI evaluates each post for sales intent → Filters out non-opportunities → Extracts structured lead data

## 🔀 Intent-Based Routing
Routes qualified leads by intent level: high → medium → low

## ✅ Actions & Notifications
Creates Asana tasks for each intent level → Sends Google Chat alerts to notify team

## 🚨 Error Handling
Catches workflow failures → Sends email alerts with error details

parameters.q: site:reddit.com ("looking for" OR "need help with" OR "any tool for" OR "recommend software")

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert sales opportunity analyst. Analyze the following Reddit post and determine if it represents a legitimate sales opportunity.

**POST CONTENT:**
{{ $json.snippet }}

**YOUR TASK:**
1. Determine if this is a real sales opportunity (true/false)
2. Assess the intent level: "high", "medium", or "low"
   - **High**: Actively looking for solutions, asking for recommendations, has budget signals
   - **Medium**: Exploring options, has a problem but no urgency
   - **Low**: Casual mention, theoretical discussion, or off-topic
3. Summarize the core problem in 1-2 sentences
4. Suggest a specific next action (e.g., "Reply with product demo", "Share case study")
5. Assign a confidence score (0-100) based on clarity and buying signals

**IMPORTANT:**
- Only mark as opportunity if there's clear problem-solving or buying intent
- Be conservative with "high" intent - reserve for clear buying signals
- Return "is_opportunity: false" for general discussions, memes, or off-topic content

Output your analysis in the structured JSON format.

data.details: The Cron node uses Cron under the hood - a time-based job scheduler in Unix-like computer operating systems. Use this node when you want to trigger workflows periodically, especially in more complex scenarios like "every Tuesday at 9 am" or "Weekdays".

data.details: In n8n, when a workflow execution fails, it can start another workflow. This second workflow can be any arbitrary workflow on your n8n instance. Use the Error Trigger node as your Trigger in the Error workflow.

generic.label: Creating Error Workflows in n8n

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
